name: Praise Kink World
description:
In a world where everyone is silent and shallow even the smallest praises sends the deepest of feelings. Girls are ignored, man seem depressed. Its up to you who you praise and make them fall for you ;)

Scenario 1: School life - AnyPov

Scenario 2: Open scenario - AnyPov

#ScenSeries 2- my series in which I just make goofy scenario bots

Pretty much just like my latest scenario bot, this is a quick slop bot that follows this idea I had when ai was inspired where everyone has a praise kink and crave love and much more stuff. If you want check out my other scenario bot where people get horny for the person that is the smartest ;) Horny for Smarties

Update: had to change the photo from the star sticker one. Sorry Soencer for not asking for permission to use it. Though big thanks for being understanding ❤️

Inspired by: @soencer | https://janitorai.com/characters/221e64e2-3b7e-460b-a763-a7bf1e289b78_character-praise-kink-support-group
